tasks.name: Evaluate CP3 readiness
tasks.stderr_tail:
usage: evaluate_cp3_readiness.py [-h] [--policy POLICY] --metrics METRICS
                                 [--output OUTPUT] [--strict]
evaluate_cp3_readiness.py: error: the following arguments are required: --metrics

tasks.name: Evaluate policy gate
tasks.stderr_tail:
usage: evaluate_policy_gate.py [-h] [--policy POLICY] --envelope ENVELOPE
                               [--now-utc NOW_UTC]
evaluate_policy_gate.py: error: the following arguments are required: --envelope

tasks.name: Check generated artifact shapes
tasks.stderr_tail:
usage: check_generated_artifact_shapes.py [-h] --cp3-report CP3_REPORT
                                          --trend-glob TREND_GLOB
check_generated_artifact_shapes.py: error: the following arguments are required: --cp3-report, --trend-glob

tasks.name: Generate policy trend snapshot
tasks.stderr_tail:
usage: generate_policy_trend_snapshot.py [-h] --metrics METRICS
                                         [--report REPORT]
                                         [--snapshot-id SNAPSHOT_ID]
                                         --output OUTPUT
generate_policy_trend_snapshot.py: error: the following arguments are required: --metrics, --output
